publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-05-31 00:13:41 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: Undetermined, Code for undetermined script script.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Photographic prints, negatives, digital files, documents, correspondence, art work, news clippings, promotional materials, and ephemera documenting the art, life, and activism of photographer Jessica Tanzer, especially her contributions to the visual record of 1980s and 90s queer culture, aesthetics, erotica, and politics in northern California and nationally and to the magazine On Our Backs. The Papers represent the complete body of her work as a photographer of erotic and queer images from the 1980s to the present. Subsequent commercial and corporate work is not included.

scopecontent.head: Content Description
scopecontent.p: Photographic prints, negatives, digital files, documents, correspondence, art work, news clippings, promotional materials, and ephemera documenting the art, life, and activism of photographer Jessica Tanzer, especially her contributions to the visual record of 1980s and 90s queer culture, aesthetics, erotica, and politics in northern California and nationally and to the magazine On Our Backs. The Papers represent the complete body of her work as a photographer of erotic and queer images from the 1980s to the present. Subsequent commercial and corporate work is not included.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: A contributing photographer to On Our Backs, Jessica Tanzer created lesbian and bisexual erotic images during a formative period for this genre in San Francisco in the 1980s and 1990s. An active member of ACT UP, her images also document the energy and individuals of that movement. Her fine art images captured the bold, sex positive energy of the racially diverse, young queer activists over those decades. Cornell's Sexuality Collection used her iconic photographs "The Box" (1990) and "Caution" as the lead images for its 2014 exhibition "Speaking of Sex." Born and raised in Portland, Oregon, she has lived in San Francisco since the early 1980s. She attended San Francisco Art Institute, has exhibited in California, Washington, Ohio, and New York, and has been published in the U.S., UK, Holland, Finland, Germany, and Australia.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to black photograph album in Box 13 restricted to the permission of the curator. Personal files in Box 14 are restricted until 2065.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Cornell University Library will refer requests to reproduce, distribute, or produce derivatives of any images created by the artist and contained in this collection to the artist or her heirs.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Jessica Tanzer papers, #7866. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes edits for "'Read My Lips' Treatment"

did.unittitle: Jacob Tanzer Brief for Respondent, no. 5338
X-ray image of Tanzer in utero

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains medical files pertaining to Tanzer's diagnoses, as well as tax and immigration information.

did.unittitle: Series II. Professional files and publications
On the Art of Cross Examination
Contract for Nothing but the Girl
Conroy + Tanzer job forms and invoices
Conroy + Tanzer O'Neill Surfwear project file
Conroy + Tanzer Moley Residence project file
Work documents and miscellaneous prints in portfolio
The New Black hosts the Uranus Show: a photo retrospective
Publicity for Jessica Tanzer and Conroy + Tanzer

did.unittitle: Steinberg, Hilary project files and prints
Series III. Ephemera and general documents

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes backstage passes, event fliers and cards, Burning Man 2000 tin, pamphlets, and show tickets.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes several items relating to 4 Non Blondes, including a signed photograph.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes photographs from various times and places, including candid photographs and professional shots.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes photographs from various times and places, including candid photographs and professional shots.
